title: ECB presses banks on AI defence plans
description: The European Central Bank on July 7 pressed major European banks to come up with action plans to deal with cybersecurity risks posed by increasingly powerful artificial intelligence systems.
content:

title: Misinformation inciting harm to refugees, UNHCR says
description: Artificial intelligence is exacerbating the spread of such misinformation and hate speech, according to the U.N. refugee agency.
content:
Misinformation and hate speech are inciting harm to refugees, with artificial intelligence exacerbating the spread, the United Nations warned Tuesday, as it urged tech giants to help turn the tide.

title: Stevens and El-Sayed trade barbs over finances, campaign funds at Michigan Senate debate
description: When asked about everything from artificial intelligence and data centers to affordability, both El-Sayed and Stevens continued to bring the conversation back to attacks over financial disclosures and campaign funds.
content:
GRAND RAPIDS, MI – At a television station in Grand Rapids, Michigan’s two Democratic U.S. Senate candidates spent almost as much time on the offensive as they did answering policy questions.

title: SpaceX's biggest bull sees valuation soaring above $10 trillion
description: Raymond James analyst Brian Gesuale initiated coverage on SpaceX with a strong buy. He set an $800 price target, projecting significant future stock appreciation. Gesuale sees SpaceX revenue soaring to $5.2 trillion by 2035. This growth is primarily based on its nascent artificial intelligence business. The analyst believes AI will become SpaceX's largest revenue source by 2027.
content:

title: Private-equity firms are sitting on a nine-year backlog
description: Investors’ artificial-intelligence worries weigh on efforts to exit software holdings.
content:
The private-equity industry’s next decade could be a slog.

title: As AI Moves Into the Physical World, Humanity & AGI Summit 2026 Brings Global Leaders to Stanford
description: STANFORD, CA, July 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The AI Robotics Alliance of America, known as AIRA, will host the Humanity & AGI Summit 2026 on Sunday, July 12, at the Stanford Faculty Club, bringing together leading voices from artificial intelligence, robotics, science, public policy, venture capital and global thought leadership.

title: Markets live: Oil prices surge after US launches strikes on Iran, ASX to slip after Wall Street's tech sell-off
description: The Australian share market is likely to fall in morning trade after a sell-off across technology and artificial intelligence (AI) stocks knocked Wall Street's tech index sharply lower. Oil prices surged after the US confirmed it launched strikes on Iran, after three commercial ships were attacked near the Strait of Hormuz. Follow live.
